settings.loginSyncHint: Sign in to sync with Xiuci Market
settings.displayNamePlaceholder: Name shown in sidebar and collaboration
settings.loginNameHint: Bound to Xiuci Market / local account; cannot edit here.
settings.modelServiceMissing: Model payment mod (xcagi-model-payment-bridge) is not installed.
settings.modelServiceMissingLead: This section shows your XiuCi wallet balance, XCauto usage, and plans. Install the host bridge mod first.
settings.modelServiceMissingWhy: It is one of nine generic host bridges (xcagi-model-payment-bridge), wiring XCauto to the market wallet and billing APIs.
settings.modelServiceMissingHow: Finish onboarding host-pack, or install the generic host bundle from Extensions / Mod store below.
settings.modelServiceMissingNote: Chat may still work without it, but balance is hidden here. Sign in with your enterprise XiuCi account and refresh.
settings.intentNotLoaded: Industry not loaded; refresh or check backend config
